rows.text: Hamatite (WS-222) Urethane one-component adhesives (Yokohama Rubber Co.)
Hamatite (WS-222) Urethane one-component adhesives (Yokohama Rubber Co.)
Penguin Seal #581 Super Urethane one-component adhesives (Sunsta Giken Co.)

items: Primers should be the designated primers and should never be mixed with other primers.
Primers are important to enhance the adhesive effect, and two types of primers, one for body and the other for glass, should be used separately.
Do not open primers and adhesives unless they are to be used.
Primers and adhesives should be stored in a cool, dark place.

blocks.text: The adhesive must be applied within 5 minutes after application.
After 1-2 hours after installation of the glass, perform a water leakage test. If water leakage occurs, dry the glass and repair it with the specified sealant.

items: When testing for leaks, do not apply water by squeezing the end of the hose.

blocks.text: Spring Fall Outside temperature approx. 20°C 3-4 hrs.
Summer: ambient temperature approx. 30°C for 1-2 hours

items: The minimum leaving time must be observed. Running the product for less than the minimum leaving time will cause adhesion failure.
